Admission Discounts

Memberships - Members visit for free! You can apply the cost of your paid admission toward the cost of your membership.

Senior Discount - $6 off admission for each senior (age 65+).

Student Discount - $6 off admission with valid student ID.

Senior Discount - $6 off admission for each senior (age 65+).

Student Discount - $6 off admission with valid student ID.

Active Duty Military Discount - Free admission to the nation's active duty military personnel including National Guard and Reserve and up to 5 of their family members each summer. A valid Military ID must be presented at check-in. This discount is available through the Blue Star Museum Program and the program begins on Armed Forces Day through Labor Day each year.
